transcript:
Customer: Hello
Agent: Hello
Customer: Ah, sollum yaaru?
Agent: Kanchana payan nu pesureengala?
Customer: Aama, neenga?
Agent: Kanchana Google-la irundhu call panirukken Kanchana.
Customer: Enga irundhu neenga sir?
Agent: Google IIT Madras Research Park-la irundhu pesuren.
Customer: Hmm, enna sollunga?
Agent: Ah, neenga data science course-ku enquiry panirukeengala Google-la?
Customer: Aama, thambi enna...
Agent: Yeah, adhu regarding-na actual-la call panirukken. Unga enquiry receive aayirukku.
Customer: Hmm, naan veetla consult panitu appuram call panitu solren sir.
Agent: Illa, enna reason-kaga enquiry panirukeenga actual-la?
Customer: Adhu web design-kaaga... illai, web designing-kaaga.
Agent: Illa, enna engalukku adhu confusion-a irukku. Neenga web designing-nu solreenga, aana vandhirukradhu data science course-ku enquiry.
Customer: Oh, theriyama paniten.
Customer: Illai, illai, rendu side-ume paathutu irukken. Coding adhu illama irukkum nu sonnanga.
Agent: Aama, designing-layum coding irukkadhu, data science-layum coding ungalukku varadhu.
Customer: Hmm, adhanaala dhaan, sari, konjam apply panitu...
Agent: But, aana, basically, inga naanga total program fee structure solren. First of all, financially ungalukku adhu okay-va nu paaru.
Customer: Hmm, sollunga.
Agent: Freshers-a potoda, salary-la varradhu total package evlo nu paatheenga na, average-a salary package candidates, freshers-a irundhu nammalta vandhu 6 LPA-la irundhu 7 LPA-ku. Seri-ngala? Like 50 to 54,000 per month basis-la place panrom. Total program fee structure will be around 73,800 on a whole. Okay-ngala? Like EMI availability-ngradhu irukkum. Like 6 months-la irundhu 24 months varaikum neenga tenure-a eduthukalam. Course 5 months dhaan. Seri-ngala? But at the same time, ungalukku financially do you think it will be comfortable for you? Or illai, idhu budget thaangina irukku appadi-nu feel panreengala? What is your mindset?
Customer: Naan veetla consult panitu ungalukku naan call panitu solren sir. Web designing-na data analytics-ku adikradha nu kekkaren.
Agent: Engalukku rendu-me same piece of cake dhaan. Seri-ngala? Naan enna panren na, details-a ellam ungalukku anuppuren. Full-a go through pannunga. Pannitu, let me know. But before that, ungaloda current profile actual-la enna ma? Enna team mudichirukeenga? Graduate looking for a career mattum irukku. Inga padikkaravanga 85% non-IT-la irundhu IT-ku change aaguravanga dhaan. So, neenga actual-la what is your current profile? Illai, ippodhukku just work-a irukkeengala?
Customer: Illa, work naan 4 years-a town panchayat-la computer operator-a irundhen. System operator-a irundhen sir.
Agent: Okay, hmm, non-IT-la irundhu.
Customer: Aama, non-IT.
Agent: Okay, okay. So, ippo vandhu like you want to enter inside IT, illaiya?
Customer: Aama, aama, yes.
Agent: Okay, all right. So, idhu vandhu, namma institution-ume like Google-oda education partner, owned by HCL and backed by IIT Research Park. Okay-ngala? So, globally recognized certification dhaan ungalukku vandhu serum. You will be certified globally-na edhula na, Google, HCL and as well as IIT M Research Park-la irundhu ungalukku certification pannuvanga. Okay-ngala?
Customer: Okay, sir.
Agent: So, idha thaandi placement ungalukku irukkum. Okay? 399 registration, remaining irukkardhu neenga EMI-a convert pannalam, you can change it over.
Customer: Placement neengale vaangi kudukreengala? So, work namma epdi perform panrom nu paathu...
Agent: Aama, adha dhaan naan sonnen. Ippo ungalukku average-a candidates-a naanga place panitu irukkardhu evlo-ku nu paatheenga na, 6 LPA to 7 LPA, 50 to 54,000 per month salary basis-la. Adhu ungalukku okay-va nu kekkaren. Because, silar enna sollvanga na, kadasi mudichathukku appuram vandhu, I want to get placed for 1 lakh, 1.5 lakhs. Fresher-a irukkavangala avlo-ku place panna mudiyadhu. Non-IT-la 10 years experience irundhalume, avanga IT-kulla nulaiyum bodhu, it is considered as a fresher only. Andha hiring partner, andha IT company-ku, you are a fresher dhaan. Okay-ngala? Because IT-na you have to know either develop in coding irukkanum, illai designer irukkanum, illai technical-a irukkanum. And data science-na ippo data analyst, analyst-a irundhirukkanum. Illa adhu related-a handle panirukkanum, illai DevOps engineer-a irundhirukkanum. Edhaavadhu onnu neenga irundhirundha, then you can tell that an experience candidate-a irundhu, appuram neenga IT-ku. Ippo neenga totally-a change panreenga, correct-ngala?
Customer: Aama, sir.
Agent: So, andha oru reason-naala dhaan, Kanchana, naanga vandhu like starting-laye kekkaren. Ungalukku indha salary package okay-ngala? Course mudichathukku appurama, placement-um naanga inga side-la ungalukku pannum bodhu, average-a like naanga inga evlo panitu irukkom-ngradha naanga munnadiye solrom. Okay-ngala?
Customer: Okay, sir. Veetla parents-ta consult panitu unga...
Agent: All right, yeah.
Customer: Okay, sir.
Agent: Okay, okay. Idhe number-la WhatsApp irukku illaiya?
Customer: Ah, irukku, sir.
Agent: Idhula details-a naanga anuppurom. Adhe oru dharava go through pannippa. Okay?
Customer: Seri, okay.
Agent: Okay?
Customer: Thank you, sir.
Agent: Thank you, thank you, thank you.
Customer: Okay, sir.
Agent: Okay.
summary: An agent from Google IIT Madras Research Park called the customer, Kanchana, regarding her enquiry for a data science course. The agent explained the course details, including a program fee of 73,800 with EMI options, and potential salary packages of 6-7 LPA after placement. The customer, currently a computer operator in a non-IT role, expressed interest but stated she needed to consult her family before committing, and the agent agreed to send details via WhatsApp.

sop_validation.explanation: The agent followed all stages of the SOP, including a proper greeting, clear self-identification and customer verification, stating the purpose of the call, offering solutions with detailed information, and closing the call appropriately.
